sample_size.evidence: It gathered data from 25,646 participants aged 16 and above.

gender_split.evidence: Share of female: 52%, share of male: 48%.

countries.evidence: EU-wide, individual-level survey that comprises information on social media usage time, patterns, motivations, and potential overuse, together with a rich set of socio-economic conditions, experiences of loneliness, and traumatic events in childhood of individuals residing in 27 European member states.

age_range.evidence: It gathered data from 25,646 participants aged 16 and above.
